particulars.description: Land on the west side of 81 diamond avenue kirkby in ashfield nottinghamshire. By way of fixed charge the benefit of all covenants and rights concerning the property and plant machinery fixtures fittings furniture equipment implements and utensils the goodwill of any business carried on at the property and the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
